creator: k-horik@yk.rim.or.jp
text:
Following patch to src/etc/mtree/BSD.x11.dist updates X11 Japanese
manual directory from /usr/X11R6/man/ja_JP.EUC to /usr/X11R6/man/ja.

This patch can be applied to both 1.1.2.2 (RELENG_2_2) and 1.2 (HEAD).

--- BSD.x11.dist.orig	Thu Mar 19 22:33:01 1998
+++ BSD.x11.dist	Thu Mar 19 22:33:32 1998
@@ -208,7 +208,7 @@
         ..
         catn            uname=man
         ..
-        ja_JP.EUC
+        ja
             cat1            uname=man
             ..
             cat2            uname=man
